inputs.label: Aylık Kira Geliri
inputs.businessContext: Mülkün aylık brüt kira geliri (ana kiracıdan elde edilen).

businessContext_i18n.en: Monthly gross rental income of the property (from the main tenant).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Mülkün aylık brüt kira geliri (ana kiracıdan elde edilen).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Revenu locatif brut mensuel de la propriété (provenant du locataire principal).
businessContext_i18n.es: Ingreso bruto mensual por alquiler de la propiedad (obtenido del inquilino principal).
businessContext_i18n.ar: إجمالي دخل الإيجار الشهري للعقار (من المستأجر الرئيسي).

inputs.label: Diğer Aylık Gelirler
inputs.businessContext: Otopark, çamaşırhane, depo kirası gibi ek gelirlerin toplamı.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total additional income such as parking, laundry, storage rent.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Otopark, çamaşırhane, depo kirası gibi ek gelirlerin toplamı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Summe der Nebeneinnahmen wie Parkplatz, Wäscherei, Lagermiete.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Total des revenus supplémentaires tels que parking, blanchisserie, loyer d'entrepôt.
businessContext_i18n.es: Total of additional income such as parking, laundry, storage rent.
businessContext_i18n.ar: إجمالي الإيرادات الإضافية مثل مواقف السيارات والمغسلة والمستودع.

inputs.label: Gider Yüzdesi
inputs.businessContext: İşletme giderlerinin efektif brüt gelire oranı (ipotek hariç). 50% kuralına göre varsayılan.

businessContext_i18n.en: Ratio of operating expenses to effective gross income (excluding mortgage). Default based on the 50% rule.
businessContext_i18n.tr: İşletme giderlerinin efektif brüt gelire oranı (ipotek hariç). 50% kuralına göre varsayılan.
businessContext_i18n.de: Verhältnis der Betriebsausgaben zum effektiven Bruttoertrag (ohne Hypothek). Standard gemäß 50%-Regel.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Ratio des dépenses d'exploitation par rapport au revenu brut effectif (hors hypothèque). Valeur par défaut selon la règle des 50 %.
businessContext_i18n.es: Ratio of operating expenses to effective gross income (excluding mortgage). Default based on the 50% rule.
businessContext_i18n.ar: نسبة مصروفات التشغيل إلى إجمالي الدخل الفعلي (باستثناء الرهن العقاري). الافتراضي وفقًا لقاعدة 50%.

inputs.label: Boşluk Oranı
inputs.businessContext: Kiracı boşluğu ve tahsilat kaybı nedeniyle gelir kaybı oranı.

businessContext_i18n.en: Income loss rate due to tenant vacancy and collection loss.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Kiracı boşluğu ve tahsilat kaybı nedeniyle gelir kaybı oranı.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Taux de perte de revenus due à l'inoccupation des locataires et aux pertes de recouvrement.
businessContext_i18n.es: Rate of income loss due to tenant vacancy and collection loss.
businessContext_i18n.ar: نسبة فقدان الدخل بسبب شغور المستأجرين وخسائر التحصيل.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
